title: Glassified
description: A simple mod that adds glass block variants to your game!
body:
This is a simple mod which adds vanilla styled glass block variants to the game!

Currently, the mod is only available for fabric 1.20.1 and 1.20.2 (that I've tested, maybe more versions are compatible as well), but I'll port it to other versions as soon as possible.

Stonecutter recipe for all modded glass blocks:
  
![Stonecutter recipe 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20785d33657a97b1b5c096ed571099e26ecbcbb6.png)

![Stonecutter recipe 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d86eea6c079d03914e2168e4491997f729c3676b.png)



Feel free to report bugs or suggestions! (On curseforge comments please)
